label: Butchery Weight Calculator
description: Calculator node that converts live weights and species/class info into estimated carcass, retail cut, and by-product weights for storehouse planning.

animals.description: Animals or lots to be processed, including live weight, species, class, and planned processing date.

yieldCurves.description: Optional species/class-specific dressing percentage and retail yield curves. If omitted, calculator falls back to sane defaults.

storehouseInventory.description: Optional current meat inventory snapshot to support planning against storehouse targets.

planningContext.description: Optional planning context such as target cut focus (roasts vs. ground), packaging sizes, and time horizon.

carcassBreakdown.description: Per-animal or per-lot estimates of hot carcass weight, chilled carcass weight, and primal weights.

retailCutPlan.description: Planned retail cut weights and units by cut type (steaks, roasts, ground, stew, etc.), per-animal and aggregated.

offalAndByproducts.description: Estimated weights for offal, bones, fat trim, soup bones, organs, and other by-products.

analytics.description: Summary metrics: average dressing percentage, retail yield percentage, total hanging weight, and total saleable meat.
analytics.hint: Can be exported to Family Fund Hub when familyFundMode is enabled.
